word: H4452 - מָלַץ - mâlats - maw-lats' - Be sweet

sections.paragraph:
Original: מלץ

Transliteration: mâlats

Phonetic: maw-lats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be smooth, be slippery
    1. (Niphal) to be smooth (agreeable, pleasant)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1205

Part(s) of speech: Verb
